content:
Also first here! Woo!
Sadly i don't know much about the story because chatgpt butchered translations lol
Time to learn Chinese
anyone know the aftermath of ch9? ||Like thais gave some important seed to keeper and they just died with it.||
||is there no consequence to losing it?||
Painting reminded me of morimens
Overall I really enjoyed the story, but the real problem is ||that the sculptors straight up disappeared and I feel like the mind break on the lanterns wasn't fitting for how bad juliette was., ||
Looks like bad Tawil lol
Looks like good tawil
the story got rush because of the reason shall not be named
looks like a crazy tree
Eos?
do you not understand the shall not be named part?
I expect more from you Doresain
idk what eos is but end of series I thought it was ending as well until the message from cat thank god I just joined the discord recently for the tournament
I think they gotta deal with some plot holes and rush part now
GDoll is the prime example
That's fine
Anything for mommymens
I’m on copium that they will continue Thais storyline
was gdoll part of the sorel story? I thought  they were talking about the sorel head space, but I was reading out loud so I may have misunderstood
nope
GDoll supposed to have her own event before Tawil
but issues happen
EoS issues due to funding?
I wish you guys play along with the Voldemort motif
Yeah I know the creator sent out a message that he was worried about continuing the game once I saw the 2.0 message I supported even though I ahd everything done f2p outside of 2.0

yeah
Glad that we have 2.x now
can’t wait for Doresain and Caraboo stories since they practically old units
Drop the lore
Whut? Old units?
Nymph has had their pictures and apparently they've been for a long while now even before the pv was released
nymph has one of the coolest pictures though with the seaweed twisting around to connect to her body that's so dope, but liz on the other hand
that chick is low res af.
I was under the impression Nymph is suicidal (or wanted to die to atone or something)
they are old units that haven’t got into the game yet

Doresain: no booba
Caraboo: freakier than Thais
Just want to see if the new units have new mechanics or just better versions of standard chars lol

well
limited units beta skills suck
they got a glorified rework when official lol
I still remembered Miryam just a better Faros
Pretty sure they've learnt something since they introduced buffs/changes to all standard chars as you said

yeah
that’s how they create Tawil Gelot lol
Wild

I'm ngl I will be hella excited for both caro
Since I feel like there is a big disparity in the realm
Either one will be a dps is my prediction
Caro needs more synergy between furnace/baby/damage + heals taken probably
A lot of times i use the furnace to save my life, not for more dps

Caro is doing- the most fine in the late game imo, granted you kind of need Helot - Catena
Aequor and Ultra are mostly there to support Chaos at this point, more Ultra but still
Helot Catena is like too good dps
Unless they make an alternative
She is like
Like Tawil overshadows chaos dps
There is her, and there there is every other Caro dps
Fair
It's not close
I wholeheartedly believe she does like- about ten times the damage of normal Helot

A kit I'd find really fun is something that can charge furnace instantly then take it away for something 
Or detract embryo charge for some bonus
it’s normal Helot
I'd prefer a kit that actually adds to furnace each time a baby is devoured/used so that you actually can keep up
she never that strong to begin with
But I agree, they should do more with the furnace
the consequences of being Sal unique mechanic for a while
Yeahhh
Normal Helot, sits and does, minimal damage or nothing at all for some turns, nukes for 60k, then waits again
Sorel also does that lol
Yeah Sorel hoards embryos, Helot holds strikes
atleast I can buff Goliath aoe with Helot next week
It's satisfying to get off but she has to wait so long just to do one nuke
And at that point the Salv keeping my team alive has already done more damage
Can't wait to relearn the game in a week
also cocoon

Chaos is the only Realm that can cross over to the other Realms
But not really
Cocoon screwing everyone over

she has Daf problem
but Daf doesn’t need to stall that long
like I can start the turn with Daf activating cocoon straight up
Daff builds up throughout all the battles
and in single fights she just takes a bit to ramp first
Helot has to do the cycle over and over
Wish they give her Sorel buff
So pick your poison i guess lol
change her role to support lol
Lol unironically she has good makings for that already
She just needs an easier time getting aliemus for exalt
yeah
like we only need to lv her exalt and rouse for aliemus
can ignore other skills

pretty cheap investment 
she doesn’t even need her E
That 100% unique strike damage bonus
helot?
Yeah
is there any units that have strike nuke?
so I can have fun with Helot
oh i use her with gelot for this reason XD
Goliath, Lily, Gelot, Alva
hmm
Let me check something
alva?
its dual realm
her 3 cost is strike
i thought u were making a team
Lotan is another choice too
lol
but eh
lotan is more of a overexalt spammer
Yeah lol it's still fun though
im 1 dupe away
You can enjoy the joys of increasing enemy health to 1000% in dive then simply chunking it away with overexalts for an easy respectable score
when i use normal helot with gelot i sell her 4 cost and 1 cost

Helot so chill
she gives you 100 coin
fr she lets me buy that strange claw or our home
no black sigil problem in sight
1000% max hp increase and only achieving the three death res triggers the 8 relics requirements still gives you 24k points
just one more month i will try it myself
it looks so fun
oh cool a plot channel
woah new channels
Bless up these new channels and behold my Naut reference irl
